note: D-2 script mappings (R-048). Coptic design: underdot = deep letters (pharyngeal/emphatic), overline = soft letters (shifted/fricated), redeeming Doc A's ⲁ̀ glottal. Unused Greek-row letters (ⲫ ⲭ ⲝ ⲯ) reserved — candidates for Coptic-style numerals later.
reservedFifthScript: A purpose-built DERIVED SCRIPT for Amraqiyyah is in digitization by @Ethnic_Tutnese (X/Twitter; a friend of Ali's, credited by handle — real name not compiled, per privacy). Ajami-derived cursive with full pointing and its own numeral glyphs; a complete manuscript-page sample seen 2026-07-21 (values not yet known — no glyph read/coined until the key lands: no false ancestors). When values arrive it slots in here as a fifth layer (map + converter in tools/script.js + orthography law) — the crown of the R-008 script ecology: a script drawn FOR the language by one of its people. Attribution stands in every rendering.
